game_info.title: Road Runner - Escape the Police!
game_info.concept: ** This casual endless runner challenges players to escape pursuing police cars by drawing the road ahead of their vehicle. Using simple tap and drag controls, players continuously create a path, aiming to outmaneuver the cops and avoid crashing. The game's core loop involves achieving the highest possible score by surviving longer as the speed and intensity of the chase increase. Progression is centered on leaderboard competition, with players striving to beat their friends' high scores in this perpetually scrolling environment. While 100% free to play, a VIP MEMBERSHIP subscription, priced at $7.99 USD weekly, offers exclusive benefits like ad removal and potentially in-game currency bonuses or unique vehicle skins.
game_info.description: Escape the relentless police pursuit in this high-speed endless runner! Draw the road ahead of your speeding vehicle to navigate through an ever-scrolling landscape. Avoid crashes, outsmart the cops, and survive as long as possible. The chase intensifies as you go—speed increases, more police cars join the pursuit, and obstacles appear. Rack up points for every second you survive and compete for the highest score!
game_info.controls:
LEFT ARROW: Steer road left
RIGHT ARROW: Steer road right
SPACE: Draw road segment (hold to draw continuously)
ENTER: Start game from START screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (returns to START screen from GAME_OVER)
